inputs.label: Minimum Individual Strength
inputs.businessContext: Lower tolerance for any single specimen

inputs.label: Maximum Individual Strength
inputs.businessContext: Upper tolerance for any single specimen

formulas.std_dev: Math.sqrt((Math.pow(s1 - (s1 + s2 + s3) / 3, 2) + Math.pow(s2 - (s1 + s2 + s3) / 3, 2) + Math.pow(s3 - (s1 + s2 + s3) / 3, 2)) / 3)
formulas.min_ok: s1 >= min_individual && s2 >= min_individual && s3 >= min_individual
formulas.max_ok: s1 <= max_individual && s2 <= max_individual && s3 <= max_individual
formulas.acceptance: (((s1 + s2 + s3) / 3) >= target) && (((Math.sqrt((Math.pow(s1 - (s1 + s2 + s3) / 3, 2) + Math.pow(s2 - (s1 + s2 + s3) / 3, 2) + Math.pow(s3 - (s1 + s2 + s3) / 3, 2)) / 3) / ((s1 + s2 + s3) / 3)) * 100 <= cv_limit) && (s1 >= min_individual && s2 >= min_individual && s3 >= min_individual) && (s1 <= max_individual && s2 <= max_individual && s3 <= max_individual)
